product_overview: Tr*st.it is a privacy-preserving rental screening platform that lets tenants prove they meet landlord requirements without exposing raw salary, credit, or employment data. It uses wallet-based identity, encrypted tenant profiles, and FHE-powered verification to return only pass/fail outcomes.
core_goals: Let tenants create a reusable encrypted profile for rental screening
Let landlords create property screening requests with clear eligibility thresholds
Enable tenants to run private eligibility verification against a landlord's requirements
Show pass/fail results and overall eligibility without revealing raw financial values
Provide separate tenant and landlord experiences with role-aware navigation

features.name: Wallet Connect and Role Onboarding
features.description: Users connect a Web3 wallet and permanently choose whether the wallet belongs to a tenant or landlord.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Connect wallet button -> Approve connection in wallet extension -> Select Tenant or Landlord role -> Confirm role selection -> See the appropriate dashboard or onboarding state

Navigate to / -> Click Connect wallet button -> Approve connection in wallet extension -> Select Tenant or Landlord role -> Confirm role selection -> See the role locked for that wallet on future visits

features.name: Tenant Encrypted Profile
features.description: Tenants create and update a reusable encrypted profile containing salary, credit score, and employment duration.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Enter monthly salary with INR or USD currency -> Enter credit score -> Select employment duration range -> Review the entered details -> Submit encrypted profile -> See the profile saved successfully
Navigate to /profile -> Enter new salary, credit score, or employment duration -> Review the updated details -> Submit encrypted profile -> See the profile update replace the previous saved profile

features.name: Landlord Create Property Screening
features.description: Landlords define a property screening request with rent, income multiplier, minimum credit score, and minimum employment duration.
user_flows: Navigate to /landlord/requests/new -> Fill in property name and optional label -> Set monthly rent with INR or USD -> Set income multiple, credit score, and employment duration requirements -> Create screening -> See the new property screening detail page with a shareable verification link

Navigate to /landlord/requests/new -> Fill in property name and optional label -> Set monthly rent with INR or USD -> Set income multiple, credit score, and employment duration requirements -> Create screening -> See the created request available in the landlord property list

features.name: Landlord Dashboard and Properties
features.description: Landlords review screening activity, browse property cards, and copy verification links to share with tenants.
user_flows: Navigate to /landlord -> View dashboard stats and property overview -> Open the Properties tab -> View screening cards for each property -> Copy a verification link from a property card -> Share the link with a tenant off-platform

Navigate to /landlord/properties -> View the list of property screenings -> Open a property detail page -> Review the screening requirements and applicant list -> Copy the verification link -> Return to the landlord dashboard or properties list
Navigate to /landlord/results -> View cross-property applicant outcomes -> Sort through applicant results across screenings -> Open a result entry -> Review the outcome details for that applicant

features.name: Tenant Verification Flow
features.description: Tenants open a landlord share link, review the stated requirements, and run a private eligibility check against their encrypted profile.
user_flows: Navigate to /verify/[shareSlug] -> Review the landlord's income, credit, and employment requirements -> Click Run verification -> Approve the wallet transaction -> See the verification process continue to the result page

Navigate to /verify/[shareSlug] -> Review the landlord's requirements and privacy explanation -> Click Run verification -> Approve the wallet transaction -> See the app redirect to the verification result page with an eligibility outcome

features.name: Verification Results
features.description: Tenants, landlords, and anonymous viewers can inspect pass/fail verification outcomes without seeing raw financial data.
user_flows: Navigate to /results/[resultId] -> View the overall eligible or not eligible verdict -> Expand the details section -> Review per-requirement pass/fail indicators -> Return to the dashboard or property page
Navigate to /landlord/results -> View applicant outcomes -> Open a shared verification result -> Review the pass/fail outcome and property context
Navigate to /dashboard -> View verification history -> Open a previous result link -> Review the eligibility outcome for that screening

routes.description: Landing page with wallet connect and role selection
First-time wallet role selection (tenant or landlord, permanent)
Tenant dashboard with verification history and profile status
Landlord dashboard with onboarding or stats overview
Single property screening detail with applicants
Tenant runs encrypted verification against landlord requirements

features.name: Wallet Connect and Role Onboarding
features.description: User connects Web3 wallet and selects permanent tenant or landlord role
user_interactions: Select Tenant or Landlord role on onboarding

features.name: Tenant Encrypted Profile
features.description: Tenant creates reusable encrypted salary, credit, and employment profile
user_interactions: Enter salary with INR or USD currency

features.name: Landlord Create Property Screening
features.description: Landlord defines property and screening requirements
user_interactions: Fill property name and optional label
Set monthly rent with INR or USD
Set income multiple, credit score, employment duration

features.name: Landlord Dashboard and Properties
features.description: Landlord views stats, property cards, and copy verification links

features.name: Tenant Verification Flow
features.description: Tenant opens share link and runs encrypted eligibility check

features.name: Verification Results
features.description: Tenant and landlord view pass/fail outcomes without raw financial data
user_interactions: View overall eligible or not eligible verdict
Navigate back to dashboard or property

known_limitations.issue: Full FHE verification requires deployed contract and testnet wallet with funds
known_limitations.impact: End-to-end verify flow may fail in test env without contract address

known_limitations.issue: Wallet connection requires browser extension (MetaMask, Rabby, etc.)
known_limitations.impact: Automated tests need wallet mock or manual approval step

known_limitations.issue: Role is permanent per wallet; switching roles requires different wallet
known_limitations.impact: Tests must use separate wallets for tenant vs landlord flows
